# SuperShot

> SuperShot is a fast, native screenshot and screen recording app for
> Windows 10 and 11, developed by TS Robotics and distributed by
> Mortgage Magick Limited. It is free, carries no telemetry and no
> advertising, and is published in the Microsoft Store as SuperShotAI.

## Site purpose

supershotapp.com is the official marketing and download site for
SuperShot. It describes the app's capture modes (region, full screen,
scrolling, timed), live annotation tools, and region screen recording
to MP4 with microphone audio, and links to the two official download
routes.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://supershotapp.com/): product overview, features, download links
- [Privacy policy](https://supershotapp.com/privacy/): how the app handles data; it collects none

## Downloads

- Microsoft Store (recommended): https://apps.microsoft.com/detail/9PMD0JVXMS6T
- Direct Windows installer (EV code-signed): https://github.com/ts-robotic/supershot-windows/releases

## Facts

- Platform: Windows 10 and Windows 11, 64-bit. There is no macOS,
  iOS or Android version.
- Price: free. No subscription, no watermarks, no account.
- Privacy: captures and recordings stay on the user's device. No
  telemetry, no analytics, no advertising.
- Current version: 2.0.0, which added region screen recording to MP4
  with microphone audio.

## Contact

- Email: info@mortgage-magic.co.uk

## Identity

SuperShot is developed by TS Robotics and solely licensed to Mortgage
Magick Limited, trading as Mortgage Magic, for distribution. This site
is a consumer software page, not a financial promotion.
